Disabled branch keeps system as plain string and messages unmodified; C3 + C3-multi assert zero 'cache_control' in stringified request.

factory.ts:161-165 correctly reads providerConfig.promptCaching (default true) and forwards { promptCaching } to AnthropicAdapter, BUT grep of factory.test.ts for 'promptCaching' returns zero results. No test passes providerConfig:{promptCaching:false} through createClient nor asserts default-true forwarding. Criterion requires 'asserted by a factory unit test'.
criteriaResults.feedback: Add factory tests: (1) createClient('anthropic', null, { apiKey, promptCaching:false }) → AnthropicAdapter constructed with { promptCaching:false } (use vi.spyOn/vi.mock('./anthropic.js') to capture the opts arg); (2) omitting promptCaching → adapter constructed with { promptCaching:true }. Do not set BOBER_TEST_DETERMINISTIC.

criteriaResults.evidence: Only the 2 flaky baseline 37-tool-count failures; all src/providers/ + factory tests green; 7 new anthropic tests pass.

generatorFeedback.description: C4 requires the promptCaching flag resolution in createClient to be asserted by a factory unit test; none exists. Factory CODE is correct — only test coverage is missing.
generatorFeedback.expected: Two new factory tests: (1) providerConfig.promptCaching=false reaches the adapter as { promptCaching:false }; (2) omitted promptCaching defaults to { promptCaching:true }. Capture the constructor opts via vi.spyOn or vi.mock('./anthropic.js'). Must not set BOBER_TEST_DETERMINISTIC.

summary: Implementation is technically correct and well-isolated; all strategies pass. C4 fails solely on its verification requirement — factory.test.ts has no test exercising providerConfig.promptCaching through createClient. One focused factory test (false + default cases) closes the sprint.
